name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
benefit: Zero balance bank account + RuPay debit card + ₹2 lakh accident insurance + ₹30,000 life insurance
benefit_hindi: Zero balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life insurance

eligibility.description: Any Indian citizen who does not have a bank account
eligibility.description_hindi: Koi bhi Bharatiya naagrik jiske paas bank account nahi hai
criteria: Indian citizen aged 10 years and above
Zero balance — no minimum balance required

documents_required: Or any one: Voter ID, Driving License, PAN card, Passport, MGNREGA card
If no documents: self-declaration with photograph attested by gazetted officer

steps: Visit nearest bank branch (any nationalized bank)
Ask for Jan Dhan account opening form
steps_hindi: Jan Dhan account ka form maangein
6 mahine baad ₹10,000 overdraft bhi milta hai

hindi_summary: Jan Dhan Yojana mein kisi bhi bank mein zero balance account khul sakta hai. RuPay debit card free milta hai. 2 lakh ka accident insurance aur 30 hazaar ka life insurance bhi milta hai. Sirf Aadhaar card chahiye. Nearest bank mein jaake usi din account khul jayega.
